title: Fix constraint calling static member function

features.name: constraint referencing rand class member
features.description: Code should include a constraint block inside a rand class that references a rand member variable of a different class type

features.name: inline constraint with with clause on nested class
features.description: Code should include an inline constraint using randomize() with { } syntax on a nested class member object

features.name: constraint accessing nested object via class member chain
features.description: Code should include a constraint that accesses a deeply nested object through a chain of class member references
